_comment: Azure Trusted Signing details for WinSquish, read at build time by installer/sign.ps1 (which drives the 'sign' dotnet global tool). These are account identifiers, not secrets -- signing authenticates with your Azure credentials (locally: 'az login'; CI: AZURE_TENANT_ID/AZURE_CLIENT_ID/AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET or a managed identity). Matching SIGN_* environment variables, if set, override these values.
